creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Created attachment 156654
Update to 3.5.0

While working at the gitlab-port, i figured out, that this port is heavly outdated.

It also relies at directly at databases/rubygem-activerecord. But the gem itself supports also activerecord4. Which itself is needed for the gitlab-port.

Therefore i wrote a patch to update the gem.
I've also added options to choose between the activerecord versions.
